Message: WU_E_NO_SERVICE - Windows Update Agent was unable to provide the service
Resolution: Restart the Windows Update service. If persists, run 'wuauclt /resetauthorization /detectnow'.

Message: WU_E_MAX_CAPACITY_REACHED - The maximum capacity of the service was exceeded
Resolution: Too many updates pending. Clear the Software Distribution folder and retry.

Message: WU_E_NOT_INITIALIZED - The object could not be initialized
Resolution: Restart the Windows Update service. Check for WMI repository corruption.

Message: WU_E_RANGEOVERLAP - The update handler requested a byte range overlapping a previously requested range
Resolution: Clear the SoftwareDistribution\Download folder and retry.

Message: WU_E_TOOMANYRANGES - The requested number of byte ranges exceeds the maximum number
Resolution: Clear SoftwareDistribution\Download folder and retry the scan.

Message: WU_E_INVALIDINDEX - The index to a collection was invalid
Resolution: WUA internal error. Reset the Windows Update components.

Message: WU_E_ITEMNOTFOUND - The key for the item queried could not be found
Resolution: The update metadata is corrupted. Force a full sync with WSUS.

Message: WU_E_OPERATIONINPROGRESS - Another conflicting operation was in progress
Resolution: Wait for the current operation to finish before starting a new scan.

Message: WU_E_CALL_CANCELLED - Operation was cancelled
Resolution: The update scan was cancelled, possibly by a maintenance window closing. Retry.

Message: WU_E_DUPLICATE_ITEM - Operation tried to add a duplicate item to a list
Resolution: WUA internal error. Reset the Windows Update agent.

Message: WU_E_TOO_DEEP_RELATION - Update relationships too deep to evaluate
Resolution: Too many chained prerequisites. Manually install prerequisite updates.

Message: WU_E_INSTALL_NOT_ALLOWED - Operation tried to install while another installation was in progress
Resolution: Wait for current install to complete. Check for stuck msiexec or TrustedInstaller processes.

Message: WU_E_NOT_APPLICABLE - Operation was not performed because there are no applicable updates
Resolution: The update does not apply to this system. Verify the update is targeted correctly.

Message: WU_E_ALL_UPDATES_FAILED - Operation completed successfully but all updates failed to install
Resolution: Check individual update errors. May be disk space, pending reboot, or dependency issues.

Message: WU_E_NO_UPDATE - There are no updates
Resolution: No applicable updates found. Verify WSUS targeting and update approval.

Message: WU_E_USER_ACCESS_DISABLED - Group Policy has disabled access to Windows Update
Resolution: Check GPO settings for Windows Update configuration.

Message: WU_E_INVALID_PRODUCT_LICENSE - Search may have missed some updates because the Windows license is not valid
Resolution: Activate Windows on the target device.

Message: WU_E_WU_DISABLED - Non-managed server access is not allowed
Resolution: The client is configured for WSUS only but tried to contact Windows Update. Check GPO.

Message: WU_E_PT_SOAPCLIENT_PARSE - SOAP client failed to parse the response from the server
Resolution: The WSUS server returned invalid data. Check WSUS server IIS health.

Message: WU_E_PT_SOAP_CLIENT - SOAP client error due to WU_E_WINHTTP_* error code
Resolution: Network connectivity issue to WSUS/SUP. Check firewall and proxy settings.

Message: WU_E_PT_SOAP_SERVER - SOAP server error from the WSUS server
Resolution: WSUS server-side error. Check WSUS IIS logs and application pool health.

Message: WU_E_PT_HTTP_STATUS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT - HTTP 408 - the server timed out waiting for the request
Resolution: Network latency or WSUS overloaded. Retry and check network path to WSUS.

Message: WU_E_PT_HTTP_STATUS_SERVER_ERROR - HTTP 500 - internal server error
Resolution: WSUS/SUP server error. Check IIS application pool and WSUS logs.

Message: WU_E_PT_HTTP_STATUS_NOT_FOUND - HTTP 404 - WSUS endpoint not found
Resolution: The WSUS/SUP URL is incorrect or IIS virtual directory is missing. Verify SUP configuration.

Message: WU_E_PT_HTTP_STATUS_SERVICE_UNAVAIL - HTTP 503 - service temporarily unavailable
Resolution: WSUS IIS application pool is stopped or recycling. Restart the WSUS application pool.
